/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_self_contained_includes.dir/link.d -shared  -o libtest_self_contained_includes.so @CMakeFiles/test_self_contained_includes.dir/objects1.rsp @CMakeFiles/test_self_contained_includes.dir/linkLibs.rsp -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
